title: Databases and Data Modeling Review Quiz

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Foreign key" in Databases and Data Modeling.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A value that references a row in another table
wrongAnswers: A group of database operations treated as one unit
Adding controlled redundancy to improve access patterns
A collection of rows and columns in a relational database

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Index" in Databases and Data Modeling.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A structure that speeds up data lookup
wrongAnswers: Undoing changes from an unfinished transaction
A database that stores records as flexible documents
One record in a database table

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Query" in Databases and Data Modeling.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A request for data or data changes
wrongAnswers: Making transaction changes permanent
A database that models entities and relationships as nodes and edges
A named field stored for each row

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "SELECT" in Databases and Data Modeling.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A SQL command used to retrieve data
wrongAnswers: The defined structure of database objects
A controlled change to database structure or data
A value that uniquely identifies a row

listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A SQL operation that combines related rows
wrongAnswers: Organizing data to reduce redundancy and inconsistency
